emails.subject: Mark Elliott/LON/ECT is out of the office.
emails.subject_base: Mark Elliott/LON/ECT is out of the office.
emails.body: See Mark's e-mail below. Wow, this is what I call vacation time! I'm going to work in the London office. Marie Heard Senior Legal Specialist Enron Broadband Services Phone: (713) 853-3907 Fax: (713) 646-8537 Marie_Heard@Enron.net Forwarded by Marie Heard/Enron Communications on 10/03/00 03:33 PM Mark Elliott@ECT 10/03/00 03:20 PM
